meaning: n.扇子,鼓风机,风扇,迷,狂热者,爱好者vt.煽动,刺激,扇,吹拂vi.飘动,成扇形散开
examples: He is a fanatical fan of Mozart.
She installed a wall-mounted electric fan.
Modem and network interface are included, too, along with a really noisy cooling fan.
Aside from the District, there are few other areas for an adult, non-Disney fan.
